analysis.reasoning: Core message: A quote expressing love for China, calling it a real and heart-warming country, and pledging to act as a cultural ambassador to bridge China–Africa friendship. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral) – not referenced; no comparison to or criticism of the West. CH2 (China as benevolent power) – implied through promoting friendship and cultural bridging between China and Africa; portrays China positively in international relations, fitting the cooperative/mutual-benefit framing. CH3 (epic history) – no historical content. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically) – no mention of political system or governance. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – no reference to governance achievements or development metrics. CH6 (interesting culture/nature/heritage) – culturally positive tone but no specific cultural, natural, or heritage content; more about diplomacy than culture itself. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
